CustomField.description: This display name is used in the Payment studio to show the list of Credit Memo when Payment source is chosen as 'Credit Memo' [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:This is formula text field, no needs to do LOAD] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]"
CustomField.formula: IF( leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled__c, Name & " | " & leaseworks__Lessee_New__r.Name & " | " & TEXT(leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Amount_New__c), Name & " | " & leaseworks__Lessee_New__r.Name & " | $" & TEXT(leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Amount_New__c) )
CustomField.label: _CreditMemo Display Name
